creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from rubyneko neko <rubyneko@gmail.com> -----

Date: Tue, 30 Aug 2011 13:23:52 +0300
From: rubyneko neko <rubyneko@gmail.com>
To: linimon@freebsd.org
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org, ruby@freebsd.org
Subject: Re: ports/160291: devel/rubygem-rake 0.9.2 update breaks readmine

It is not a bug.

Unfortunately, redmine wants very old libraries, and that problem is not
FreeBSD only.

http://www.redmine.org/projects/redmine/wiki/RedmineInstall
>> Rake 0.8.7 is required (rake 0.9.x is not supported by Rails yet)

Use gem for hard install different version. Downgrading this port only for
redmine is a bad idea.

----- End forwarded message -----
